data.title: Bitcoin mining difficulty drops with average block time at 9.8 minutes, close to 10-minute target. Difficulty likely to rise next.
data.description: The current average block time, as reported, stands at approximately 9.8 minutes, slightly below the targeted 10-minute block time. This data comes from CoinWarz.

data.title: Compass Pathways Commends White House Executive Order to Accelerate Research and Access for Psychedelic Treatments
data.description: A biotech company, Compass Pathways plc (Nasdaq: CMPS), applauds the White House Executive Order aimed at expediting medical treatments for serious mental illnesses. This order acknowledges the critical need for addressing the mental health crisis affecting millions of Americans. Compass Pathways, dedicated to enhancing patient access to evidence-based innovations, supports the recognition of FDA-approved psychedelics for their potential impact on mental health.

data.title: Haloid Solutions Expands Access to Radio Equipment by Offering Flexible Financing and Leasing Solutions Named HaloidFLEX
data.description: On April 18, 2026, in New York, Haloid Solutions announced a new initiative to assist businesses and municipalities in procuring essential communication equipment, even amidst financial limitations. Through its HaloidFLEX program, specialized financing and leasing options are now available to help facilitate access to these resources.

data.title: Fresh Faces, New Perspectives: Diversity Among New REALTORS® in 2024
data.description: In the 2024 NAR Member Profile, it was highlighted that the new REALTORS® joining the association exhibit greater diversity compared to their more experienced peers. This diversity trend is significant, with a higher representation of people from various backgrounds entering the profession. This finding sheds light on the changing demographics within the real estate industry, indicating a shift towards increased inclusivity among new NAR members.

data.title: Guggenheim Investments Again Ranked Among Top Taxable Bond Fund Families by Barron's
data.description: Company secures its fourth top-five ranking since 2020, with three years holding the top position. The firm's consistent success in the past years showcases its impressive performance and competitive edge in the industry.

data.title: Instant Reaction: CPI, August 14, 2024
data.description: Recent data released on August 14, 2024 indicates a stabilization in inflation, as reflected in the Consumer Price Index (CPI). This development suggests a more tranquil economic environment, potentially paving the way for the Federal Reserve to commence a series of interest rate cuts beginning in September. Chief Economist Lawrence Yun expressed optimism regarding this favorable trend in inflation numbers.
Stantec renews share buyback program and initiates an Automatic Share Purchase Plan. #stocks #investment

data.title: Novonesis issues EUR 1.7 billion senior unsecured notes
data.description: Novonesis, operated through Novozymes A/S, effectively priced and concluded the sale of EUR 1.7 billion senior unsecured notes, referred to as the "Notes," on March 12, 2026. This offering took place within the recently launched EUR 4 billion Euro Medium Term Note (EMTN) Programme, which was initiated on March 10, 2026.

data.title: Labrador Gold Announces Closing of Change of Business and Acquisition of Units of Northern Shield
data.description: On March 9, 2026, Labrador Gold Corp. (TSX.V: LAB | FNR: 2N6) received final approval from the TSX Venture Exchange for its Change of Business to a hybrid Mining/investment issuer, approved by shareholders on February 24, 2026. The Board of Directors elected at the Meeting includes Roger Moss, James Borland, Leo Karabelas, and Kevin Ramsay. The decision was made to maintain the company name as Labrador Gold Corp. The halt on the company's common shares will be lifted and trading will commence as a hybrid Mining/investment issuer under the symbol “LAB” on Wednesday, March 11, 2026.
RCI Banque to issue EUR 600M fixed rate notes maturing in May 2034.

data.title: Thor Equities Secures $16M Financing for 139 Fifth Avenue in NYC’s Flatiron District
data.description: Today, Thor Equities Group, a prominent urban real estate developer, finalized a new financing deal with Northeast Bank for $16,000,000 for its property located at 139 Fifth Avenue in New York City's Flatiron District. This property is renowned for its iconic status in the area.

data.title: Anaptys Provides Update on Business Separation and Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: On March 3, 2026 in San Diego, AnaptysBio, Inc. (Nasdaq: ANAB), a biotech firm in the clinical stage that specializes in developing new immunology treatments, shared information about the possible spin-off of its biopharmaceutical endeavors. The company also released its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025.

data.title: Loci Capital Completes Exit Through Strategic Recapitalization of Prose Stevens Pointe Multifamily Investment
data.description: Loci Capital has successfully completed the recapitalization exit of Prose Stevens Pointe, an apartment community located in St. Cloud, FL, near Orlando. This workforce housing property comprises 264 units.

data.title: Trump DOL rekindles joint-employer push
data.description: The Labor Department is reviewing its guidelines on when businesses can be held accountable for wage and overtime infractions carried out by their franchisees or subcontractors. This reconsideration could impact various industries, including fast-food chains, temporary staffing agencies, and construction companies.

data.title: Clariane announces the success of its offering of €500 million of senior notes
data.description: The information contained in this release is not intended for dissemination or distribution in the United States of America, Canada, Japan, Australia or any other jurisdiction where it may violate the law to do so.
Nano Dimension sells AME and Fabrica product lines, expanding their market reach with the recent transaction.

data.title: NovaBay Pharmaceuticals Announces Name Change to Stablecoin Development Corporation, Reports Initial Staking Rewards, and Provides SKY Token Holdings Update
data.description: Stablecoin Development Corporation recently secured a substantial $134 million investment from R01 Fund LP, Framework Ventures, Tether Investments, S.A. de C.V., and Sky Frontier Foundation. This investment has enabled the acquisition of 2.06 billion SKY tokens by the corporation.

data.title: Multitude Capital Oyj & Multitude AG repurchased more outstanding capital notes, boosting their financial portfolio.
data.description: In a recent report, it was highlighted that a total of 2,500 individuals have been affected by the ongoing health crisis in the area. The local authorities have confirmed 450 new cases in the past week alone, bringing the total number of confirmed cases to 10,000. Additionally, it was noted that 150 individuals have sadly lost their lives due to the virus. The situation remains critical as hospitals are reaching full capacity, with 300 patients currently in critical condition. The government has announced that they will be implementing stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus, including a mandatory mask mandate in all public spaces. Residents are urged to follow health guidelines and protocols to protect themselves and others during this challenging time.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Spike 1,300 Points, Oil Prices Dive On Trump-Iran Ceasefire; What To Do Now
data.description: Stock market futures associated with the Dow Jones Industrial Average surged by 1,300 points while oil prices experienced a significant drop. President Trump has agreed to temporarily cease attacks on Iran for a period of two weeks. Iran has announced intentions to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, albeit with certain conditions attached. Investors and traders are advised to monitor the situation closely following the sharp market movements.

data.title: Inspira Technologies Appoints Yoav Rozanovich as Chief Business Officer to Drive Immediate Revenue Growth and Quantum Expansion
data.description: Inspira Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd disclosed the hiring of Yoav Rozanovich as Chief Business Officer (CBO), aiming to enhance its commercial activities after venturing into quantum computing connectivity and taking over the Additive Manufacturing of Electronics (AME) division from Nano Dimension Ltd. This move comes after the company's expansion and acquisition from Nano Dimension Ltd. (Nasdaq: NNDM). With this change, Inspira Technologies aims to bolster its business operations in these new areas.
